MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Mar-19-2010 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Deem Admitted Pltf'S Request For Admissions, Set One, And For Santions In The Amount Of $556.00;
Off Calendar Jan-19-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
Plaintiff's Motion To Deem Admitted Plaintiff's Request For Admissions, Set One, is granted. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiff's Request For Admissions are deemed admitted. Sanctions are awarded against Defendant in the amount of $190, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.
=(EAH/612)
